fields.description: Warehouse where this minimum production batch size applies. The automation matches item+warehouse to find the floor quantity.
fields.label: Warehouse

fields.description: Minimum units to produce per run (in the selected UOM). If the calculated shortage is less than this, the Production Plan qty is raised to this value to avoid under-utilising production machines.
fields.label: Min Manufacturing Qty

fields.description: UOM for Min Manufacturing Qty. The automation converts this to the item's Stock UOM before comparing with the shortage quantity.
fields.label: UOM
